title: U.S. is 'being humiliated by Iran,' says Germany's Merz, as Europe's patience wanes
summary_full: The U.S. is being "humiliated" by the Iranian regime, Germany's chancellor has said, as European leaders grow increasingly frustrated at the war in Iran.
summary_public: The U.S. is being "humiliated" by the Iranian regime, Germany's chancellor has said, as European leaders grow increasingly frustrated at the war in Iran.

DE.label: negative
DE.evidence: Germany's Merz, as Europe's patience wanes
